label: fabricated
reason: The document purports to authorize explicit age-based applicant screening, which fundamentally contradicts the ADEA's prohibitions, and no such EEOC Technical Guidance exists.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 99
REASON: This document purports to allow explicit age-based screening of job applicants, which directly contradicts the fundamental purpose of the ADEA; the EEOC has no authority to create a "safe harbor" for age-cohort filtering, no such Technical Guidance 2025-03 exists, and the described provisions (e.g., filtering applicants outside a 25-49 age range) would be facially illegal age discrimination.
